text: Describe your morning routine in detail.
What would you do if you won the lottery?
Tell me about your favorite movie and why you like it.
What is the best advice you have ever received?
Describe your ideal vacation destination.
What superpower would you choose and how would you use it?
Explain how to cook your favorite dish.
What does a perfect weekend look like to you?
Describe the last book you read.
If you could meet any historical figure, who would it be and why?
What is something you are proud of?
Describe the city you live in to someone who has never been there.
What would you take to a deserted island?
Tell me about a childhood memory that makes you smile.
What is your opinion on social media?
Describe a skill you would like to learn and why.
What changes would you make if you were president for a day?
Explain your favorite type of music and how it makes you feel.
What would you tell your 10-year-old self?
Describe the perfect meal.
What do you think the world will look like in 50 years?
Tell me about someone who inspires you.
What is the most beautiful place you have ever seen?
Are smartphones making life better or worse? Explain your view.
Describe your dream house.
What hobby would you recommend to a friend and why?
If you could switch lives with any animal for one day, which would you pick?
How do you usually celebrate your birthday?
What is the hardest thing you have ever done?
Do you think money buys happiness? Why or why not?
Describe a teacher who had a big impact on you.
What kind of weather do you love the most and why?
If you wrote a book, what would it be about?
Describe your first day at a new job or school.
What is the best invention of the last century? Defend your choice.
Tell me about a time you got lost.
What traditions does your family have?
If you could travel back in time, which era would you visit?
Describe your favorite season and what you do during it.
What does success mean to you?
Tell me about a gift that meant a lot to you.
Should schools require students to wear uniforms? Why or why not?
Describe a person you met only once but still remember.
What would you do with one extra hour in your day?
Is it better to be an only child or have siblings? Share your thoughts.
Describe a sound that brings back memories for you.
What steps would you take to survive a zombie apocalypse?
Tell me about your favorite café or restaurant.
What does 'being happy' look like in daily life?
If you could master any language instantly, which would it be and why?
